entity: Luka Dončić 73 PTS vs Atlanta Hawks on 2024-01-26 (DAL 148-143; the 4th-highest single-game point total in NBA history, surpassed only by Wilt's 100, Kobe's 81, and David Robinson's 71)

query_target.sql: SELECT pts FROM analytics_player_game_complete WHERE full_name = 'Luka Doncic' AND game_date = '2024-01-26' AND pts = 73

notes: Active player; match:gte per the active-player convention. Dončić shot 25-of-33 from the field, 8-of-13 from three, and 15-of-16 from the line. The fixture pins the game total (73 PTS) on the date BBR records it.
